de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder

Class RewriteTacletGoalTemplate

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.TacletGoalTemplate
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.RewriteTacletGoalTemplate

  • public class RewriteTacletGoalTemplate
extends TacletGoalTemplate
    this class inherits from TacletGoalTemplate. It is used if there is a replacewith in the ruleGoals that replaces a term by another term. For a sequent AntecSuccTacletGoalTemplate

    • Field Summary

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      term that replaces another one

        addedSeq - new Sequent to be added
        addedRules - IList contains the new allowed rules at this branch
        replacewith - the Term that replaces another one
        pvs - the set of schema variables
